title: Create: Garnished Reworked
description: Create: Garnished reworked to be more friendly for new players and less overwhelming.
body:
[![mmc-reviews](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/mmcreviews_64h.png?raw=true)](https://mmcreviews.com/all/mods/create-garnished/) [![curseforge](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/curseforge_64h.png?raw=true)]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/garnished](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/garnished)) [![github](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/github_64h.png?raw=true)](https://github.com/DakotaPride/create-garnished) [![discord](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/social/discord-plural_64h.png?raw=true)](https://discord.gg/8NkWwu9hgN) [![kinetic_hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57e54853825c80a1ccf03302564e00b3483d7e57.png)](https://www.kinetichosting.net)
Available for Fabric & NeoForge! If you're looking for the pre-rework version, which has stuff like Bulk Dyeing, superheating with Peanut Oil, etc. - [go here instead](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-garnished). In the reworked version of Create: Garnished, I've adopted a wild crop system similar to that of Farmer's Delight, specifically for the Peanuts and Ginger Roots added. Breaking each wild crop will result in either Peanuts or Ginger Roots dropping, of course using silk touch or shears will provide the wild crop itself for decoration or better returns. A new flower is also added in relation to the Wild Ginger Roots crop, the Marigold flower, which is purely decorative.




Pine Nuts can be found atop Spruce trees in the Taiga and a few of the other related biomes. Additionally, you can find a new variant of Sweet Berries - Elven Sweet Berries, which can be used to make a special Elven Tea! You'll quickly find that the 1.21.x rework focuses more on Tea processing and general fluid processing quite a bit more than previous versions.





Flower Forests and Sunflower Plains will now generate with Blossoming Almond Trees, of which you can harvest Blossoming Almond Leaves for Almonds!



Birch Forests and Old Growth Birch Forests will have Hazelnut trees generating, of which you can harvest the Hazelnut Leaves to obtain Hazelnuts. As previously, hazelnuts can be used as an alternative to make Chocolate. Additionally, certain Birch trees will generate with some Birch Sap dripping from the log, right-click with an empty Glass Bottle and you can further process it into Birch Syrup.



## Contributors/Credits Create: Garnished Reworked in DejojoTheAwsome's "You NEED These Nuts in Minecraft Create Mod" Create: Garnished (Reworked) in Shalz's "The Most Confusing Create Addon" (fair) [DejojoTheAwsome](https://www.youtube.com/@dejojotheawsome) - (Pre-rework) Overview [v0.5, v0.8] [Create Dev Team](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) - Original Mod Developers & Artists [Create Fabric Dev Team](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) - Fabric Mod Developers & Artists ## Available Versions Minecraft 1.21/1.21.1 - Fabric/Neoforge - Priority Minecraft 1.20/1.20.1 - Fabric/Forge - Supported, but will likely be updated at a slower rate than more modern versions of the mod ## Dependencies in 1.21+ Requires [Fabric API](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) on Fabric (Currently not supported on Fabric just yet) Requires [Create](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/create) on Neoforge (Currently not supported on Fabric just yet) Requires [Patchouli](https://www.modrinth.com/patchouli) on Neoforge (Currently not supported on Fabric just yet)
